basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has released the official Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 Notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the JIPMER Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 30 years with a qualification of three-year General Nursing and Midwife (GNM) course with minimum second-class or equivalent CGPA, or B.Sc (Nursing), can apply through Email mode. The last date to submit the application is 15 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 30 years as on last date of receipt of applications
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years as on the last date of receipt of applications.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum second-class equivalent or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing and Midwife (GNM) course Or B.Sc (Nursing)
qualification.details: Minimum second-class equivalent or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing and Midwife (GNM) course B.Sc (Nursing) Work experience in clinical research projects after nursing course Able to work in MS-Word/Excel/Power Point Undertaken Health related field-based data collection Masters course including MPH

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JIPMER Project Nurse II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Nurse II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to send your complete application via email is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Nurse II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a minimum second-class equivalent or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing and Midwife (GNM) course or a B.Sc (Nursing) degree.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 30 years as on the last date of receipt of applications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse II position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs.20,000/- plus 18% HRA, totaling approximately Rs.24,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JIPMER Project Nurse II job?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to email their filled application form, CV, and supporting documents to the specified email ID before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test, a skill test, and an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Nurse II post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the JIPMER located?
faq.answer: JIPMER is located in Puducherry.
